title: Fuzzer `parse_fuzz_test` crashes with `Statistics mismatch: vector labeled as not having NULL values, but vector contains null values`
description:
### What happens?

Hi! We found a crashing PoC by the fuzzing driver `parse_fuzz_test` with the output:
```
ABORT THROWN BY INTERNAL EXCEPTION: Statistics mismatch: vector labeled as not having NULL values, but vector contains null values: CONSTANT VARCHAR: 1 = [ NULL]

Aborted (core dumped)
```

### To Reproduce

PoC

```sql
PRAGMA enable_verification;
CREATE TABLE t00t0ta000(a STRUCT(f INTEGER,f0 STRUCT(g0 VARCHAR,g INTEGER)));
INSERT INTO t00t0ta000 VALUES((0,(0,0)));
SELECT a.f0.g FROM t00t0ta000;
```

### OS:

Linux

### DuckDB Version:

https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb/commit/041b68304fee39b0eb770f745d1b282b7f9fe004

### DuckDB Client:

Fuzzer

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

gal1ium

### Affiliation:

HKU

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a source build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(a STRUCT(f INTEGER, f0 STRUCT(g0 VARCHAR, g INTEGER)));
SELECT a.f0.g0 FROM test_table WHERE a.f0.g0 IS NULL;
SELECT a.f0.g FROM test_table WHERE a.f0.g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Statistics mismatch with NULL values in non-NULL labeled vector
